'''Utos''' was the [[Star/Legends|primary star]] of the [[Utos system]]. Located near the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] at the very edge of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by six [[Planet/Legends|planets]], one [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]], and a captured [[Comet/Legends|comet]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
